title: Meekjr Cooked Modpack (discontinued)
body:
**KUBEJS CURRENTLY DOES NOT LOAD IN THE CURRENT DOWNLOAD !!**

An over-engineered modpack for 1.19.2 quilt running mostly fabric mods. Made for some pals, but anyone is free to indulge.

A something-for-everyone experience. Includes Origins, Create, Farmers delight, and of course the hardest hitting of em' all: Clumps.

Using your own Origins datapacks is encouraged! Just be weary, using more spirit/ghost-y origins is not advised, as we already got Requiem!

There are some known issues, such as some recipies not liking REI (the loom from DimDoors, for example.) and Hexlands worldtype crashing in the end.

Overall, it's mostly finished, but can use some tweaking and polish. Please comment any issues, suggestions, ect.

please don't check the kubejs scripts, I am not proud of them.
